title: Significant Benefit Work Permits - Live Webinar
content:
Mark your calendars for September 11, 2024, at 12:00 PM EST for an enlightening live webinar hosted by two esteemed immigration law experts, Cindy Switzer and Tamara Mosher-Kuczer. This webinar , which will also be available as a video recording, promises to provide a comprehensive understanding of Significant Benefit Work Permits under the C10 and C11 LMIA exemptions of the International Mobility Program.
This course will delve into the intricacies of Significant Benefit Work Permits, focusing on the C10 and C11 LMIA exemptions . Participants will gain insights into the purpose and eligibility requirements for these permits, and learn how to assess economic, social, and cultural benefits. The webinar will also cover strategic considerations for when and where these work permit options should be employed.

### Meet the Instructors

#### Cindy Switzer, B.A. LL.B
Cindy Switzer is a seasoned immigration lawyer at MKS Immigration Lawyers , specializing in both Canadian and US immigration law. With over 20 years of experience, Cindy has a wealth of knowledge in helping individuals and businesses navigate cross-border immigration challenges. Beyond her professional role, Cindy is actively involved in her community, raising two children and a dog, and serving as a board member for a public legal education non-profit.

#### Tamara Mosher-Kuczer
Tamara Mosher-Kuczer is the Founder and Principal Lawyer at Lighthouse Immigration Law Professional Corporation. Recognized as a Certified Specialist in Canadian Citizenship and Immigration Law by the Law Society of Ontario, Tamara has dedicated over nine years to this field. Her expertise has helped numerous clients secure work permits, permanent residency, and citizenship in Canada. Tamara’s peers have consistently recognized her contributions, listing her in Best Lawyers™ Canada since 2018.
Click here to learn more and register today to secure your spot for this informative session!
